mapper.select: SELECT q.que_id, q.que_title, q.que_like_num, a.ans_id , a.ans_content, a.ans_time, a.ans_like_num, a.ans_comm_num, u.user_id , u.user_name, u.user_head, u.user_intro FROM Question q LEFT JOIN Answer a ON q.que_id = a.ans_que_id LEFT JOIN User u ON a.ans_author_id = u.user_id WHERE a.ans_id = ( SELECT ans_id FROM answer WHERE ans_que_id = q.que_id ORDER BY ans_time ASC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY q.time DESC
SELECT * FROM Question WHERE que_id = LAST_INSERT_ID()

SELECT q.que_id, q.que_title, q.que_like_num, a.ans_id , a.ans_content, a.ans_time, a.ans_like_num, a.ans_comm_num, u.user_id , u.user_name, u.user_head, u.user_intro FROM Question q LEFT JOIN ( -- 模拟 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ans_que_id ORDER BY ans_time DESC) SELECT ans.ans_id, ans.ans_que_id, @row_number := IF(@current_que_id = ans.ans_que_id, @row_number + 1, 1) AS rn, @current_que_id := ans.ans_que_id AS dummy FROM Answer ans CROSS JOIN (SELECT @row_number := 0, @current_que_id := NULL) vars ORDER BY ans.ans_que_id, ans.ans_time DESC ) ranked_answers ON q.que_id = ranked_answers.ans_que_id AND ranked_answers.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN Answer a ON a.ans_id = ranked_answers.ans_id LEFT JOIN User u ON a.ans_author_id = u.user_id WHERE q.que_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.que_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT q.que_id, q.que_title, q.que_like_num, a.ans_id , a.ans_content, a.ans_time, a.ans_like_num, a.ans_comm_num, u.user_id , u.user_name, u.user_head, u.user_intro FROM Question q LEFT JOIN Answer a ON q.que_id = a.ans_que_id LEFT JOIN User u ON a.ans_author_id = u.user_id WHERE a.ans_id = #{id}
